flags.concern: Payment UI restart recovery: `PaymentConfirmView` will still be re-registered for admin_chat real payments unless the pending-confirmation recovery query/path is filtered, so the old recipient gate survives restarts.
flags.evidence: Addressed all 19 gate flags in a focused revision (no re-scope). Key fixes: (1) New Step 3 updates `producer_flows.py` to add `ADMIN_DM` to `admin_chat.real_confirmed_by` — reuses the **existing** `PaymentActorKind.ADMIN_DM` (not a new `ADMIN_CLICK`). flags.concern: Did the work fully address the issue hints, user notes, and approved plan requirements?: Checked Revision 3's crash-safety argument in Step 9.1 against the explicit constraint that `PaymentConfirmView` must no longer fire for admin_chat real payments. The plan now relies on `PaymentConfirmView` as a fallback for an orphaned new-flow admin_chat `pending_confirmation` payment when the bot crashes between `request_payment(...)` and the intent update, which reintroduces the very recipient-confirmation path the brief said must be removed for admin_chat real payments.
flags.evidence: Revision 4 applies three surgical fixes to address iteration-3 gate flags: (1) **Eliminated the `awaiting_wallet` placeholder for verified-wallet fast path.** Step 9 now defines TWO helpers: `_gate_existing_intent` (for test-receipt positive, intent already exists → request_payment → atomic update with status+final_payment_id → admin DM) and `_gate_fresh_intent_atomic` (for auto-skip, no intent yet → duplicate check → request_payment → atomic INSERT of intent with status='awaiting_admin_approval' AND final_payment_id in one call → admin DM). Steps 11 and 13 use the new helper instead of placeholder state. No intent is EVER observed in `awaiting_wallet` during the verified-wallet path. Closes FLAG-013, correctness-1, callers-1, issue_hints-2, all_locations-2. (2) **Added a startup orphan-payment reconciliation sweep** in new Step 18 (`_reconcile_admin_chat_orphan_payments`). Runs BEFORE `_register_pending_confirmation_views` via a new `cog_load` ordering dependency from PaymentUICog → AdminChatCog. Four cases: auto-skip crash (no intent → cancel orphan via existing `cancel_payment`); test-receipt crash (intent in awaiting_test_receipt_confirmation → complete the intent update + fire admin DM); legacy `awaiting_confirmation` → leave alone for PaymentConfirmView re-registration; already wired → leave alone for AdminApprovalView re-registration. Crash-safety no longer requires falling back to PaymentConfirmView for new-flow admin_chat real payments. Closes FLAG-012, issue_hints-1, scope-1. (3) **`resolve_admin_intent` now cascade-cancels linked `payment_requests`** via the existing `db_handler.cancel_payment(payment_id, guild_id)` primitive (mirrors `admin_chat_cog.py:616-620`). Cascade runs BEFORE the intent update; refuses to act if any linked payment is in `submitted`/`confirmed`/`manual_hold` status (operator must use `/payment-resolve` first). Closes FLAG-014, correctness-2, scope-2, all_locations-1, callers-2. Also added `find_admin_chat_intent_by_payment_id` DB helper (Step 2.6) as a fallback lookup for the orphan sweep. Added four new orphan-sweep tests and three new resolve-cascade tests in Step 21. Updated success criteria: removed the criterion about `awaiting_wallet` placeholder (no longer exists); added an explicit "no placeholder state" criterion; updated the crash-safety criterion to describe the sweep-based recovery rather than PaymentConfirmView fallback; added a resolve-cascade criterion.

flags.evidence: Revision 4 applies three surgical fixes to address iteration-3 gate flags: (1) **Eliminated the `awaiting_wallet` placeholder for verified-wallet fast path.** Step 9 now defines TWO helpers: `_gate_existing_intent` (for test-receipt positive, intent already exists → request_payment → atomic update with status+final_payment_id → admin DM) and `_gate_fresh_intent_atomic` (for auto-skip, no intent yet → duplicate check → request_payment → atomic INSERT of intent with status='awaiting_admin_approval' AND final_payment_id in one call → admin DM). Steps 11 and 13 use the new helper instead of placeholder state. No intent is EVER observed in `awaiting_wallet` during the verified-wallet path. Closes FLAG-013, correctness-1, callers-1, issue_hints-2, all_locations-2. (2) **Added a startup orphan-payment reconciliation sweep** in new Step 18 (`_reconcile_admin_chat_orphan_payments`). Runs BEFORE `_register_pending_confirmation_views` via a new `cog_load` ordering dependency from PaymentUICog → AdminChatCog. Four cases: auto-skip crash (no intent → cancel orphan via existing `cancel_payment`); test-receipt crash (intent in awaiting_test_receipt_confirmation → complete the intent update + fire admin DM); legacy `awaiting_confirmation` → leave alone for PaymentConfirmView re-registration; already wired → leave alone for AdminApprovalView re-registration. Crash-safety no longer requires falling back to PaymentConfirmView for new-flow admin_chat real payments. Closes FLAG-012, issue_hints-1, scope-1. (3) **`resolve_admin_intent` now cascade-cancels linked `payment_requests`** via the existing `db_handler.cancel_payment(payment_id, guild_id)` primitive (mirrors `admin_chat_cog.py:616-620`). Cascade runs BEFORE the intent update; refuses to act if any linked payment is in `submitted`/`confirmed`/`manual_hold` status (operator must use `/payment-resolve` first). Closes FLAG-014, correctness-2, scope-2, all_locations-1, callers-2. Also added `find_admin_chat_intent_by_payment_id` DB helper (Step 2.6) as a fallback lookup for the orphan sweep. Added four new orphan-sweep tests and three new resolve-cascade tests in Step 21. Updated success criteria: removed the criterion about `awaiting_wallet` placeholder (no longer exists); added an explicit "no placeholder state" criterion; updated the crash-safety criterion to describe the sweep-based recovery rather than PaymentConfirmView fallback; added a resolve-cascade criterion.

flags.concern: Payment UI startup ordering: Revision 4 makes `PaymentUICog.cog_load()` depend on an `AdminChatCog` orphan-sweep accessor, but the current bootstrap and test harness load `PaymentUICog` before or without `AdminChatCog`, so the plan misses required bootstrap/test updates or a fallback path.
flags.evidence: Revision 5 applies two surgical fixes to resolve the iteration-4 concerns: (1) **Inverted the orphan-sweep dependency** — moved `_reconcile_admin_chat_orphans` OUT of `AdminChatCog` and INTO `PaymentUICog` itself. The sweep only needs `self.db_handler`, `self.payment_service`, `self.bot`, and `self._send_admin_approval_dm`, all already accessible from the UI cog. This eliminates the cross-cog ordering problem entirely: no `bot.admin_chat_cog.reconcile_orphan_payments_for_ui_cog()` accessor, no `main.py` bootstrap reorder, no test harness changes, no `FakeBot` additions. Added a critical regression test `test_payment_ui_cog_loads_without_admin_chat_cog` in `test_payment_cog_split.py` that validates `PaymentUICog.cog_load()` works with a `FakeBot` that has no `admin_chat_cog` attribute. Closes FLAG-015, correctness (v4), all_locations (v4), callers (v4). (2) **Restored unified atomic batch semantics via a new transient `awaiting_admin_init` state.** All `initiate_batch_payment` entries (verified + unverified) now go through ONE `create_admin_payment_intents_batch` call — true all-or-none single-DB-call semantics matching the brief's fail_to_pass test. Verified entries are inserted with `status='awaiting_admin_init'`; unverified with `status='awaiting_wallet'`. `awaiting_admin_init` is added to the CHECK constraint (Step 1), silently ignored by the state-machine dispatch (Step 7 — new unit test `test_state_machine_silently_ignores_awaiting_admin_init` asserts posting a Solana address never reopens the test path), and handled by the orphan sweep as a new case (e): stale `awaiting_admin_init` intents older than 5 minutes with no `final_payment_id` are cancelled (fail-closed, no payment_requests cleanup needed because no payment row was ever created). After the atomic batch insert succeeds, verified entries iterate through the existing `_gate_existing_intent` helper (unified with the test-receipt-positive path) to create their payment and transition to `awaiting_admin_approval`. Added `test_initiate_batch_payment_verified_fan_out_transitions_to_awaiting_admin_approval` and `test_initiate_batch_payment_fan_out_crash_leaves_awaiting_admin_init_for_sweep`. Closes FLAG-016, issue_hints (v4), scope (v4). `_gate_fresh_intent_atomic` stays in place for the SINGLE `initiate_payment` verified path (no batch wrapper); batch exclusively uses `_gate_existing_intent` for fan-out. No changes to Phases 1-3 structure, no changes to `main.py`, no changes to `test_payment_cog_split.py` or `test_scheduler.py` harnesses.
